intro: Between April 13 and 25, 2026, ZCyberNews published 16 articles under the threat-intelligence tag, with GopherWhisper and LockBit as the most covered threat actors. The reporting highlighted seven high-severity incidents, six informational pieces, and one medium-severity item, affecting sectors including technology, critical-infrastructure, cybersecurity, financial services, and government. Observed impacts spanned Asia, Europe, North America, and global regions, reflecting a concentrated period of intelligence on these actors and their targets.
